# Sentinels in Syrius

> Evidence-backed documentation for implementing a Sentinel service node that runs from
> inside the Syrius wallet. Syrius already runs a full Zenon node in-process and serves RPC
> from it; the framework to be a Sentinel is present, and the MVP needs no consensus change.
> Claims about Syrius carry file:line receipts; provenance is tagged [DOC]/[INF]/[OPEN].

## Start here

- [Overview](/): the thesis, how the docs are organized, and where to start.
- [AI Agent Guide](/implementation/agent-guide): how an AI agent should use these docs to implement the work; source-of-truth hierarchy and non-negotiable rules.

## Understanding Sentinels

- [Purpose & Architecture](/understanding/purpose-and-architecture): the three conflicting documented roles of a Sentinel.
- [Economics & Open Questions](/understanding/economics-and-open-questions): staking, incentives, the fee-vs-feeless tension.
- [Sources & Provenance](/understanding/sources): every [DOC] claim mapped to a primary source.

## The Investigation (evidence)

- [Investigation & Evidence](/evidence/investigation): forensic proof that the framework is in Syrius, with file:line receipts and a raw Q&A appendix.

## Build it

- [Specification](/specification/sentinel-service-layer): the design contract for the Sentinel service layer (v1, peer-reviewed).
- [Build Roadmap](/implementation/roadmap): ordered, scoped tasks with code anchors and acceptance criteria.

## Community

- [Forum Post](/community/forum-post): the community-facing pitch.

## Source code

- Syrius (submodule, pinned v0.2.4-alphanet): https://github.com/zenon-network/syrius
- SDK: znn_sdk_dart v0.0.7
- Primary papers: https://github.com/TminusZ/zenon-developer-commons
